resources.string: Realign phone for faster charging
Realign phone to charge wirelessly
The device will soon turn off; press to keep it on.
No SIM in phone.
PIN codes does not match
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, this phone will be reset, which will delete all its data.
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %d times. This phone will be reset, which will delete all its data.
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, this user will be removed, which will delete all user data.
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %d times. This user will be removed, which will delete all user data.
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, the work profile will be removed, which will delete all profile data.
You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %d times. The work profile will be removed, which will delete all profile data.
You have incorrectly drawn your unlock pattern %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, you will be asked to unlock your phone using an email account.\n\n Try again in %3$d seconds.
Phone turned off due to heat
Your phone is now running normally.\nTap for more info

Your phone was too hot, so it turned off to cool down. Your phone is now running normally.

Your phone may get too hot if you:
	• Use resource-intensive apps (such as gaming, video, or navigation apps)
	• Download or upload large files
	• Use your phone in high temperatures
Phone is getting warm
Some features limited while phone cools down.\nTap for more info
Your phone will automatically try to cool down. You can still use your phone, but it may run slower.\n\nOnce your phone has cooled down, it will run normally.
The fingerprint sensor is on the power button. It’s the flat button next to the raised volume button on the edge of the phone.
Unlock your phone for more options
Playing on this phone
You can locate this phone with Find My Device even when powered off
